name: Dolmas
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onion and herbs in a food processor fitted with a metal blade.
2. Saute the onion in olive oil until translucent.
3. Mix the remaining ingredients (except grape leaves and chicken broth) thoroughly with the sauted onion.
4. Drain the grape leaves, separate them, and dry them.
5. Place 1 tablespoon of meat mixture on each leaf and roll up.
6. Put any leftover leaves at the bottom of a skillet.
7. Arrange the dolmas in the pan in 2 layers.
8. Squeeze lemon over the dolmas.
9. Cover with additional leaves if available, then chicken stock.
10. Weigh down the pot with a heatproof plate and cover.
11. Simmer for about 1-1/2 hours. Best served at room temperature.
